title: 1 Fragrant Rosa Lovers Meeting Orange Climbing English Rose Bare Rooted Bush Plant for Brighten Garden Outdoor Landscape Shrub Border Walkway Hedge
features: Lovers Meeting Climbing Rose is a breathtaking climbing rose with large, cup-shaped blooms in shades of soft pink and apricot.
It is a popular choice for trellises, walls, and fences, adding a touch of elegance and romance to any outdoor space.
Planting Time: Jan - May, Sept - Oct
This Fragrant bare rooted Rose plant is carefully wrapped up in moist dark compost.
